name: 0g-databounty
description: Verifiable dataset bounty market for the 0G ecosystem.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @0g-databounty/shared && npm run build -w @0g-databounty/api && npm run build -w @0g-databounty/web
scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @0g-databounty/shared && npm run typecheck -w @0g-databounty/api && npm run typecheck -w @0g-databounty/web
